briefdescription.para: Provide a reasonable size for apps using getnameinfo.

memberdef.argsstring: (const char *host, const char *service, const struct zsock_addrinfo *hints, struct zsock_addrinfo **res)
memberdef.name: getaddrinfo

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct sockaddr *addr, socklen_t addrlen, char *host, socklen_t hostlen, char *serv, socklen_t servlen, int flags)
memberdef.name: getnameinfo
